heading: Tax on circulating notes generally
label: 541 Tax on circulating notes generally
text: In lieu of all existing taxes, every association shall pay to the Treasurer of the United States, in the months of January and July, a duty of one-half of 1 per centum each half year upon the average amount of its notes in circulation.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 5214 derived from , , which was part of the National Bank Act. See .act June 3, 1864, ch. 106, § 4113 Stat. 111section 38 of this title
